mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the unemployment rate above 4.5% signals a weakening labor market that reduces consumer spending and corporate profitability, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with UNRATE > 4.5% are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in housing starts above 1.5 million units signals a strengthening demand for housing that boosts consumer spending and corporate profitability, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with HOUST > 1.5 million are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production below 112.5 signals a weakening supply chain that reduces corporate profitability and increases production costs, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with INDPRO < 112.5 are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the federal funds rate above 5.25% signals a tightening monetary cycle that compresses equity valuations and reduces corporate profitability, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with FEDFUNDS > 5.25% are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decrease in initial jobless claims below 250,000 signals a strengthening labor market that reduces unemployment and boosts consumer spending, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with PAYEMS < 250,000 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real GDP above 11500 signals a strengthening demand for goods and services that boosts corporate profitability and reduces production costs, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with GDPC1 > 11500 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the real GDP below 11400 signals a weakening supply chain that reduces corporate profitability and increases production costs, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 < 11400 and INDPRO < 112.5 for 3 consecutive months
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with GDPC1 < 11400 and INDPRO < 112.5 are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).
